'''tharaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qiyan|qiyan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qiyan|qiyan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tharaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæræyæth|thæræyæth]] || [[word:thæræyæj|thæræyæj]] || [[word:thæræyæsh|thæræyæsh]] || [[word:thæræyæ|thæræyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thararayath|thararayath]] || [[word:thararayaj|thararayaj]] || [[word:thararayash|thararayash]] || [[word:thararaya|thararaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharayath|tharayath]] || [[word:tharayaj|tharayaj]] || [[word:tharayash|tharayash]] || [[word:tharaya|tharaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafyath|tharafyath]] || [[word:tharafyaj|tharafyaj]] || [[word:tharafyash|tharafyash]] || [[word:tharafyaf|tharafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tharayatha|tharayatha]] || [[word:tharayaja|tharayaja]] || [[word:tharayasha|tharayasha]] || [[word:tharayaka|tharayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tharayath|tharayath]] || [[word:tharayaj|tharayaj]] || [[word:tharayash|tharayash]] || [[word:tharaya|tharaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tharayathal|tharayathal]] || [[word:tharayajal|tharayajal]] || [[word:tharayashal|tharayashal]] || [[word:tharayakal|tharayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tharayathatha|tharayathatha]] || [[word:tharayajaja|tharayajaja]] || [[word:tharayashasha|tharayashasha]] || [[word:tharayaka|tharayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tharayathan|tharayathan]] || [[word:tharayajan|tharayajan]] || [[word:tharayashan|tharayashan]] || [[word:tharayakan|tharayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tharayathaoro|tharayathaoro]] || [[word:tharayajaoro|tharayajaoro]] || [[word:tharayashaoro|tharayashaoro]] || [[word:tharayakaoro|tharayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
